query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `magneticCards` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `cardNumber` varchar(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `status` enum('pending','active','inactive','blocked','expired') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  `blockReason` enum('security_incident','policy_violation','investigation','emergency'),
  `blockType` enum('temporary','permanent'),
  `blockUntil` timestamp NULL,
  `blockedBy` int,
  `blockedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `companyType` enum('centre3','contractor','subcontractor','client') NOT NULL,
  `companyId` int,
  `idType` enum('saudi_id','iqama') NOT NULL,
  `idNumber` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `fullName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `fullNameAr` varchar(255),
  `birthDate` date NOT NULL,
  `nationality` varchar(100),
  `gender` enum('male','female') NOT NULL,
  `bloodType` varchar(10),
  `mobile` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(255),
  `profession` varchar(255),
  `idIssueDate` date,
  `idIssuePlace` varchar(255),
  `idExpiryDate` date NOT NULL,
  `photoUrl` varchar(500),
  `idDocumentUrl` varchar(500),
  `contractUrl` varchar(500),
  `yaqeenVerified` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `yaqeenVerifiedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `yaqeenOverrideBy` int,
  `yaqeenOverrideReason` text,
  `issueDate` timestamp NULL,
  `expiryDate` timestamp NULL,
  `requestId` int,
  `requestedBy` int NOT NULL,
  `approvedBy` int,
  `approvedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `siportCardId` varchar(100),
  `siportSyncedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `siportSyncStatus` enum('pending','synced','failed') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `siportSyncError` text,
  `deactivatedBy` int,
  `deactivatedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `deactivationReason` enum('resignation','termination','contract_ended','security_concern','lost','stolen','damaged','expired','other'),
  `deactivationNotes` text,
  `replacesCardId` int,
  `replacedByCardId` int,
  `lostReportCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `lastLostReportAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `magneticCards_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
